findings.title: Missing course metadata validation tests
findings.description: No tests for validating course.json schema compliance, required fields (title, description, difficulty, estimatedHours), or malformed course files.

findings.title: Missing lesson structure validation
findings.description: No tests for lesson ordering gaps, duplicate lesson IDs, or empty lesson content validation.

findings.title: Missing markdown content validation
findings.description: No tests for markdown frontmatter parsing, broken links, or malformed markdown in lesson content.

findings.title: Missing challenge edge case tests
findings.description: No tests for challenges with null/empty required fields, malformed test cases, or missing solution files.

findings.title: Missing content relationship validation
findings.description: No tests for challenge-to-lesson mapping, lesson-to-module consistency, or orphaned content detection.

findings.title: Process-based runtime detection tests are slow
findings.description: RuntimeDetectionTests.CheckRuntimeAsync spawns actual processes with 5-second timeouts. 6 tests use Theory with process execution. These should be mocked.
findings.recommendedAction: Replace with mocked process execution or move to integration test suite

findings.title: Runtime detection has environment dependencies
findings.description: DetectRuntime_ChecksCorrectCommand tests depend on system having python, node, java, etc. installed. Tests will fail on clean CI environments.
findings.recommendedAction: Mock Process.Start or use docker-based test environment

findings.title: Missing PistonExecutor tests
findings.description: PistonExecutor.cs exists in WPF app but has no corresponding E2E tests. Critical for multi-language code execution.

findings.title: Missing CodeExecutionService tests
findings.description: No E2E tests for the main CodeExecutionService that orchestrates between Roslyn and Piston executors.

findings.title: Missing InteractiveProcessSession tests
findings.description: InteractiveProcessSession.cs provides REPL-style execution but has no E2E tests.

findings.title: RoslynExecutorTests lacks proper cleanup isolation
findings.description: Console.SetOut/SetError manipulation in ExecuteAsync could affect subsequent tests if not properly isolated.
findings.recommendedAction: Add test-level cleanup to restore Console streams, or use [CollectionDefinition(DisableParallelization = true)]

findings.title: Missing Roslyn edge case tests
findings.description: RoslynExecutorTests lacks tests for empty/null code, very long code, or memory pressure scenarios.

findings.title: Missing CourseService integration tests
findings.description: No E2E tests for CourseService which loads and manages course content in the WPF app.

findings.title: Missing ProgressService persistence tests
findings.description: No tests for actual file system persistence, corruption handling, or migration scenarios.

findings.title: Missing NavigationService tests
findings.description: NavigationService.cs handles view navigation but has no E2E tests for navigation flows.

findings.title: Weak assertions in LearningJourneyTests
findings.description: Several tests only check basic properties without validating actual business logic or state transitions.
findings.recommendedAction: Add state-based assertions and validate user journey transitions

findings.title: Test data hardcoding in ProgressTrackingTests
findings.description: Multiple tests use hardcoded lesson/challenge IDs instead of factory methods or test data builders.
findings.recommendedAction: Create TestDataFactory or builders for UserProgress and related entities

findings.title: Missing edge case tests for progress tracking
findings.description: No tests for null handling, empty strings, or malformed progress data.

findings.title: Missing achievement system comprehensive tests
findings.description: Achievement tests are basic. Missing tests for edge cases like multiple achievements, progressive unlock thresholds, and achievement persistence.

findings.title: Missing TutorService tests
findings.description: QwenTutorService, Phi4TutorService, LlamaTutorService have no E2E tests. Critical for AI tutoring feature.

findings.title: Missing View/Control tests
findings.description: No E2E tests for WPF views (LessonPage, CoursePage, LandingPage) or controls (CodingChallenge, QuizChallenge, etc.).

findings.title: Missing SyntaxHighlightingService tests
findings.description: SyntaxHighlightingService.cs provides code highlighting but has no E2E tests.

findings.title: Missing ModelDownloadService tests
findings.description: ModelDownloadService.cs manages AI model downloads but has no E2E tests.

top10MissingTestAreas.impact: Critical - Core feature for Python, Java, etc. execution
High - Main entry point for all course content

immediate: Create PistonExecutorTests.cs with mocked HTTP responses
Add CourseService E2E tests with temporary file fixtures
Add ProgressService file persistence tests with cleanup
shortTerm: Add content schema validation tests using JSON Schema
Create TestDataFactory for UserProgress and Course models
Add edge case tests for all challenge types
longTerm: Implement UI automation tests with FlaUI or similar
Add performance tests for slow operations
Create integration test suite with docker-compose
Add mutation testing for critical paths
